title: Grok Agent Orchestra Spec
description: Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema for the Orchestra extensions on top of a Grok Build Bridge spec. Bridge fields are validated by grok_build_bridge.parser.load_yaml; this schema validates only the Orchestra additions — the `orchestra` block and the extended `safety` fields — and is applied as a second pass by grok_orchestra.parser.load_orchestra_yaml.

combined.description: When true, this spec drives the combined Bridge + Orchestra runtime: Bridge generates code, Orchestra debates it, Lucas vetoes the synthesis, then deploy. Both `build:` and `orchestra:` blocks are required.

build.description: Bridge build spec — validated by grok_build_bridge's own schema. Orchestra leaves this as an open object so Bridge stays the source of truth for its fields.

Orchestra.description: Orchestra-specific configuration block; required for pure-Orchestra runs.

mode.description: Execution mode. `native` dispatches to the xAI multi-agent endpoint, `simulated` runs a prompt-driven named-role debate, `auto` picks native when available and simulated otherwise.

agent_count.description: Number of native agents the multi-agent model should orchestrate. Ignored in simulated mode.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort hint. Maps to `agent_count` when `agent_count` is omitted: low/medium → 4, high/xhigh → 16.

include_verbose_streaming.description: Stream per-role thought-chain events over the Rich TUI.

use_encrypted_content.description: Use encrypted content envelopes. Playground-only today; do not enable in production pipelines.

debate_rounds.description: Number of debate rounds to run. Simulated mode only; ignored in native.

debate_style.description: Label exposed to consumers describing which debate surface is rendered.

agents.description: Display-only metadata surfaced in the marketplace UI; not used by the runtimes.

AgentMeta.description: Marketplace metadata for a single named role.

name.description: Role name. Use `custom` for marketplace-defined personas.

role.description: Functional role the agent plays in the debate.

model.description: Optional per-role model override. Grok models (anything matching grok* / xai/* / x-ai/*) keep the native fast path; LiteLLM-style provider/model strings (openai/gpt-4o, anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet, ollama/llama3.1) route through the [adapters] extra.

pattern.description: Which orchestration pattern to drive the runtime with.

config.description: Pattern-specific configuration. Validated by the matching $defs entry below based on `pattern`.

FallbackOnRateLimit.description: Policy for degrading when the native multi-agent endpoint is rate-limited.

enabled.description: Whether to fall back when hitting a 429.

fallback_model.description: Single-agent model id to use as the fallback.

lowered_effort.description: Reasoning effort to use after falling back.

ToolRouting.description: Optional per-agent tool allowlist. Keys are agent names (alphanumeric, `_`, or `-`).

^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$.description: Tools the named agent is permitted to invoke.

NativePatternConfig.description: Pass-through config for the `native` pattern; accepts no keys.

HierarchicalConfig.description: Config for the hierarchical planner→sub-roles pattern.

coordinator.description: Name of the role that serves as the top-level planner.

DynamicSpawnConfig.description: Config for the dynamic speaker-election pattern.

max_spawns.description: Max number of ad-hoc sub-agents that can be spawned.

sub_tasks.description: Number of sub-tasks Grok decomposes the goal into before fanning out concurrent mini-debates.

DebateLoopConfig.description: Config for the fixed-roster debate loop.

consensus_threshold.description: Confidence above which the debate terminates with consensus.

iterations.description: Number of full debate-loop iterations to run before giving up. Each iteration runs one debate round + a mid-loop Lucas veto + a consensus check.

ParallelToolsConfig.description: Config for the parallel fan-out / fan-in pattern.

RecoveryConfig.description: Config for the retry-with-reflection recovery pattern.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of reflective retries before giving up.

SafetyExtension.description: Orchestra additions to the Bridge `safety` block. Bridge safety fields remain valid (additionalProperties: true).

lucas_veto_enabled.description: When true, every agent-authored side effect must pass a Lucas veto review.

lucas_model.description: Model used by the Lucas veto reviewer.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence Lucas must have to approve an action.

max_veto_retries.description: Number of rewrite-retry attempts before Lucas blocks permanently.
